notes: Session 21 (cont.): 2 new stories assigned (US-186 Pylint fix, US-187 obd→obdii rename) for Sprint 12. US-186 addresses a Pylint workflow failing on every commit since repo creation (default snake_case vs project camelCase, Python 3.8/9/10 vs 3.11+, missing dep install). Ruff + mypy via make pre-commit already cover the real lint path. US-187 is the B-042 fulfillment (mechanical package rename ~45 files, closes I-014). Sprint 12 also brings in US-183 + US-165 from the walk-followup bucket. Next available: US-188.
